creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
I think I wasn't looking close enough.

Whenever I move the poudriere.conf file into /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/ and leave NO poudriere.conf in usr/local/etc, after an update of ports-mgmt/poudriere the installer installs the template poudriere.conf into usr/local/etc - and within this, ZPOOL is definitely not set.

Unfortunately, poudriere seem to read on startup first /usr/local/etc/poudriere.conf - as I conclude from its behaviour, and neglect then /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/poudriere.conf (where ZPOOL is set correctly).
